creator: adam.strohl-fbsd@ateamsystems.com
text:
Created attachment 167110
Fixes redeclaration if initgroups()

The issue appears to be that src/shrpx.h defines initgroups() and doesn't use the HAVE_UNISTD_H define flag to see if it should or shouldn't.

The attached patch wraps this definition around an #ifndef statement to avoid defining it if you've got unistd.h, which the rest of the code uses:

 #if defined(HAVE_DECL_INITGROUPS) && !HAVE_DECL_INITGROUPS
+#ifndef HAVE_UNISTD_H
 inline int initgroups(const char *user, gid_t group) { return 0; }
+#endif
 #endif // defined(HAVE_DECL_INITGROUPS) && !HAVE_DECL_INITGROUPS

For immediate fix you can drop the attached patch into your <poudriere port base>/www/nghttp2/files directory and rebuild. Verified that it works here (compiling on 10.1 with a 10.1 poudriere jail):

====>> [01] Starting build of www/nghttp2
====>> [01] Finished build of www/nghttp2: Success
